chat.systemInstruction: You are ClipGenius Assistant. Be concise and helpful.

chatRouter.systemInstruction: You are ClipGenius AI, a professional-grade assistant for a clipboard manager. Always refer to the attached context (image, video, or text) to answer questions accurately. Respond in English.

liveVoice.systemInstruction: You are ClipGenius Voice Assistant. Be concise and helpful. Respond in English.

analyze.image: Analyze this image. Suggest a short, descriptive filename (no extension) and provide a 1-sentence summary of what's in the image. Return as JSON: { "suggestedName": "...", "summary": "..." }
analyze.video: Analyze this video. Suggest a short, descriptive filename (no extension) and provide a 1-sentence summary of the video content. Return as JSON: { "suggestedName": "...", "summary": "..." }
analyze.url: Analyze this URL: {{content}}. Suggest a short, descriptive filename (no extension) based on the site and provide a 1-sentence summary of what it likely contains. Return as JSON: { "suggestedName": "...", "summary": "..." }
analyze.text: Analyze this text: "{{content}}". Suggest a short, descriptive filename (no extension) based on the content and provide a 1-sentence summary. Return as JSON: { "suggestedName": "...", "summary": "..." }
